assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 22-23 contain the table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and '|---|---|---|---|' with no data rows following.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 26-29: '## Jira Configuration' section with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 33: 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' under the '## Code Intelligence' heading.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 20-21: 'No Serena MCP tools found (no tools matching `mcp__<instance>__find_symbol` / `get_symbols_overview` / `search_for_pattern` / `replace_symbol_body` pattern)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 30: 'No Atlassian MCP tools found in available tool listing'; line 36: 'User chose: Option 2 -- Skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually'; lines 40-45 show manual entry of Project key, Cloud ID, and Feature issue type ID.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 22: 'Informed user: No Serena MCP servers were found'; line 23: 'User chose: Continue without code intelligence'. This documents the prompt and the user's choice to proceed without setting up Serena.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 39-43: '## Bug Configuration' section with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 99-103: 'Asked user whether to enable security triage' / 'User declined' / 'Result: Security Configuration skipped'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after Bug Configuration at line 43.
